[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01001011 4
1 00110010 3
2 01111111 7
3 11011100 5
4 01001011 4
5 11111111 a
6 11111111 a
7 11111111 a

01 00111011 5
12 11100111 6
23 01111111 7 match 2

56 11111100 6
67 01101011 5
70 11111100 6
